content.text: The active configmap is `ingress-nginx-controller`; `-extra` is a decoy. Let me configure OTel on the real configmap.

input.command:
cat <<'EOF' > /tmp/otel-cm.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: ingress-nginx-controller
  namespace: ingress-nginx
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: controller
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: ingress-nginx
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ingress-nginx
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: ingress-nginx
    app.kubernetes.io/version: 1.14.1
data:
  enable-opentelemetry: "true"
  opentelemetry-trust-incoming-span: "true"
  otlp-collector-host: "otel-collector.otel.svc"
  otlp-collector-port: "4317"
  otel-sampler: "AlwaysOn"
  otel-sampler-ratio: "1.0"
  otel-sampler-parent-based: "false"
  otel-service-name: "ingress-nginx"
  log-format-upstream: '$remote_addr - $remote_user [$time_local] "$request" $status $body_bytes_sent "$http_referer" "$http_user_agent" otel_trace_id=$opentelemetry_trace_id otel_span_id=$opentelemetry_span_id'
EOF
kubectl apply -f /tmp/otel-cm.yaml
sleep 15; kubectl -n ingress-nginx logs deploy/ingress-nginx-controller --tail=30 | grep -iE "reload|opentelemetry|error|otel"

input.command:
POD=$(kubectl -n ingress-nginx get pod -l app.kubernetes.io/component=controller -o name | head -1)
echo "POD=$POD"
kubectl -n ingress-nginx exec $POD -- grep -ic "opentelemetry" /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
echo "--- opentelemetry_on / module ---"
kubectl -n ingress-nginx exec $POD -- grep -iE "opentelemetry on|otel_trace_id|load_module.*otel|otel" /etc/nginx/nginx.conf | head

content.text: OTel module loaded, sampling and log format applied. Now generate the request and check the log.

input.command:
kubectl -n demo exec curl-test -- curl -sS -H "Host: otel.example.com" \
  http://ingress-nginx-controller.ingress-nginx.svc/otel-check
echo "=== EXIT $? ==="
sleep 3
kubectl -n ingress-nginx logs deploy/ingress-nginx-controller --tail=50 | grep "otel-check" | tail -5
input.description: Send request and check access log

description: Send request and check access log

summary: Send request and check access log

content.text: The access log now contains non-empty trace and span IDs. Let me confirm the trace was exported to the collector.

input.command: kubectl -n otel logs deploy/otel-collector --tail=80 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "trace_id|span_id|ResourceSpans|ingress-nginx|TracesExporter|otel-check" | tail -20
